account.description: The account name of the owner of the certificate

auto_renew.description: Whether auto renew is enabled (true) or disabled (false)

auth_file.description: The auth file for the certificate

approver_email.description: The approver email for the certificate

common_name.description: The common name for the domain

cancel_time.description: The time when the certificate was cancelled

ordered_time.description: The time when the certificate was ordered

wildcard.description: A boolean flag that indicates if the certificate is for a wildcard domain

domains.description: A list of domains for the certificate

status.description: The current status of the certificate

approved_time.description: The time the certificate was approved

expires_time.description: The time when the certificate expires

serial_number.description: The **Certificate Serial Number** as defined in the X.509 standard. Presented as a **hexadecimal string**.
